title: Simplicity Enhanced
description:
A lightweight performance and QoL modpack.

Boost your FPS, enjoy smart features, and keep the vanilla spirit intact.
body:
# 🧊 Simplicity Enhanced

A lightweight client-side pack that makes Minecraft **faster, smoother, and cleaner** while keeping the vanilla feel.  
Built for players who want **huge performance gains** and a set of **fresh quality-of-life upgrades** without unnecessary extras.  

💡 On my hardware: from **300 FPS to over 1400 FPS**.  

---

## 🌟 What’s Inside

### 🚀 Performance
- Massive FPS boost with optimized rendering  
- Lower CPU and GPU usage in the background  
- Faster loading and near-instant world saving  
- Stable and responsive, even on low-end systems  

### 🛠️ Quality of Life 
- Some Quality of Life like 3D-Skin Layer
- more

### 🎨 Visual Touches
- Optional shaders and improved lighting  
- Smooth connected textures and terrain  
- Subtle UI improvements that stay true to vanilla  

---

## ✅ The Experience

Simplicity Enhanced keeps Minecraft **simple and familiar**, but makes it **feel brand new**.  
You’ll notice the difference the moment you start playing — it just runs better, looks cleaner, and feels smoother.  

---

## 📦 Client-Side Only
